creator: oliver@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm not able to reproduce this - please tell me the steps on how to reproduce it:


root@kartoffel courier-authlib-mysql> make install > & /dev/null
root@kartoffel courier-authlib-mysql> md5 /usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc*
MD5 (/usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc) = 7ccb6062f58422b030683ec2309ad8ad
MD5 (/usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc.dist) = 7ccb6062f58422b030683ec2309ad8ad
root@kartoffel courier-authlib-mysql> ed /usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc
8812
/MYSQL_SERVER
MYSQL_SERVER            mysql.example.com
d
i
MYSQL_SERVER            foo.bar.com
.
w
8806
q
root@kartoffel courier-authlib-mysql> md5 /usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc*
MD5 (/usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc) = 7267890a33be9e8802d40e75d102f8a5
MD5 (/usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc.dist) = 7ccb6062f58422b030683ec2309ad8ad
root@kartoffel courier-authlib-mysql> make deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for databases/courier-authlib-mysql
===>   Deinstalling courier-authlib-mysql-0.62.1
root@kartoffel courier-authlib-mysql> make install > & /dev/null
root@kartoffel courier-authlib-mysql> md5 /usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc*
MD5 (/usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc) = 7267890a33be9e8802d40e75d102f8a5
MD5 (/usr/local/etc/authlib/authmysqlrc.dist) = 7ccb6062f58422b030683ec2309ad8ad
root@kartoffel courier-authlib-mysql> 

As you see - with the next installation, my custom/modified
authmysqlrc is unchanged.


-- 
 Oliver Lehmann
  http://www.pofo.de/
  http://wishlist.ans-netz.de/
